Hear Entry in action

Listen to how Entry handles your customers

Greeting
0:05
"Hello and thank you for calling Entry. This is Entry. How can I help you today?"
Service Inquiry
0:20
"I'd be happy to help you with that. We offer a range of services including consultations, installations, and ongoing support. Would you like me to tell you more about any specific service?"
Taking a Message
0:10
"Of course, I'll take a message for you. Can I get your name and the best number to reach you?"
Unwanted Calls
0:09
"I appreciate you reaching out, but we're not interested at this time. Thank you for understanding. Goodbye."
Goodbye
0:06
"Thank you for calling Entry. Have a wonderful day!"
© Entry Privacy & terms
